name: United States Steel Corporation
description: United States Steel Corporation, commonly known as U.S. Steel, is a leading integrated steel producer headquartered in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, with major production operations in the United States and Central Europe. Founded in 1901, the company manufactures a wide range of value-added steel sheet and tubular products for the automotive, appliance, container, industrial, construction, and oil and gas industries. U.S. Steel maintains a competitive advantage through its iron ore mining operations and its commitment to sustainable steelmaking processes, including its Best for All® strategy which focuses on innovation and environmentally friendly solutions.
